question: Assuming it is now Wednesday, what can we conclude about the average number of website visits for the entire week?

options.A: We cannot reliably determine the weekly average from this chart
options.B: The weekly average is about 13 visits, using all seven days shown
options.C: The weekly average is about 29 visits, using only the days with bars
options.D: The weekly average is exactly 30 visits because the first three bars are around that height

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
